visual_analysis.description: A green soda can with 'Sprite' written on it, located in the middle.
A yellow lemon to the left and in front of the green soda can.
A red soda can with 'Coca-Cola' written on it, to the right of the green soda can.
A clear plastic water bottle behind the red soda can.
The wooden surface on which all objects are placed.

action_plan.explanation: The yellow lemon is in front of the green soda can, blocking a direct grasp. It must be moved first to clear the path.
The primary target, the green soda can, is now accessible and can be picked up.
